title: node.contract
description: The per-node execution contract, one per node attempt lineage. Holds the persistent attempt counter and gate the retry guard reads. Field names and enum values are locked byte-for-byte per references/state_model.md (node.contract fields).

cache_key.description: hash(inputs + prompt + model + config); a matching prior success permits a resumable skip.

attempt.description: Persistent attempt counter; the retry guard reads this, never memory.

status.description: Current status from the node status enum.

evidence_ref.description: Path to this node's evidence artifact.

started.description: When the current attempt started (ISO-8601), or null.

finished.description: When the current attempt finished (ISO-8601), or null.

compensation_of.description: If this is a compensation node, the node_id it undoes (saga pairing); else null.

status.description: Node status. The canonical, complete set of 15 node statuses. Terminal: completed, cancelled, deprecated.

gate.description: The evidence gate ({kind, threshold, rubric, evidence_ref}).

threshold.description: Pass threshold for scored gates (0..1). null for pass/fail gates.

rubric.description: Path to a rubric document for judged gates, or null.

evidence_ref.description: Path where this gate's evidence is written.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of execution attempts for this node before escalating past local_retry.

backoff_base_seconds.description: Base backoff between attempts (multiplied per attempt for exponential backoff).

jitter.description: true to add randomised jitter to backoff.
